svg.title: CoffeeManager-OS Independent Agent Architecture
svg.desc: Five enhancement modules connected to a central AI agent brain: VMI/Sodra Compliance, Predictive Labor Scheduling, Supply Chain and Waste Analytics, Customer Sentiment Loop, and Machine Self-Diagnosis.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the central AI agent brain coordinate all modules?')
sendPrompt('How would the VMI/Sodra compliance bridge module work in detail?')
sendPrompt('How would predictive labor scheduling work using weather and foot traffic data?')
sendPrompt('How does the supply chain and waste analytics module track recipe costing and over-pouring?')
sendPrompt('How would the customer sentiment loop connect to Google Reviews and trigger win-back offers?')
sendPrompt('How would machine self-diagnosis use shot time and temperature data to predict maintenance?')
sendPrompt('Explain the human-in-the-loop confirmation requirement for tax filings')
sendPrompt('What outputs does CoffeeManager-OS deliver to the owner and manager?')

svg.text: Click any module to explore it further
